name: Joint Offensive
descriptionTemplate: After attacking, there is a X% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the target and other enemies within 1 grid of the target. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turn.

progression.renderedDesc: After attacking, there is a 20% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the target and other enemies within 1 grid of the target. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turn.
progression.renderedDescFr: Après avoir attaqué, there is a 20% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the cible and other ennemis within 1 grid of the cible. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more dégâts, lasts pendant 1 tour.

longDesc: Compétence spécifique à un général. « Joint Offensive » monte jusqu'au niveau 5. Au niveau maximum (5), elle applique l'effet suivant : « Après avoir attaqué, there is a 100% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the cible and other ennemis within 1 grid of the cible. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more dégâts, lasts pendant 1 tour. ». Signature de carte — impossible à remplacer, définit souvent l'identité tactique du général.
longDescEn: A general-specific skill. "Joint Offensive" scales up to level 5. At max level (5), the skill applies the following effect: "After attacking, there is a 100% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the target and other enemies within 1 grid of the target. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turn.". A card signature — cannot be swapped; it often defines the general's tactical identity.
longDescDe: Eine generalspezifische Fähigkeit. „Joint Offensive“ skaliert bis Stufe 5. Auf Maximalstufe (5) wirkt folgender Effekt: „After attacking, there is a 100% chance that a tracking mark will be added to the target and other enemies within 1 grid of the target. Targets with tracking mark receive 20% more damage, lasts for 1 turn.“. Eine Karten-Signatur — nicht austauschbar, prägt oft die taktische Identität des Generals.
